docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE RE: NTC OF MTN AND HEARING ON VERIFIED PETITION TO RELEASE PROPERTY; VERIFIED PETITION; DEC; ETC (TRANSACTION ID # 63041316) FILED BY PETITIONER REALSMART FUND 23 L.P. A LIMITED PARTNERSHIP

PETITION TO RELEASE PROPERTY FROM MECHANIC LIEN FILED BY PETITIONER REALSMART FUND 23 L.P. A LIMITED PARTNERSHIP AS TO RESPONDENT RELIANCE BUILDING & MAINTENENACE, LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DOES 1 TO 10
MINI MINUTES FOR APR-05-2019 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PETITIONER REALSMART FUND 23 L.P.'S MOTION AND HEARING ON VERIFIED PETITION TO RELEASE PROPERTY FROM MECHANICS LIEN IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. ACCORDING TO CIVIL CODE 8488 (A), "[A]T THE HEARING BOTH (1) THE PETITION AND (2) THE ISSUE OF COMPLIANCE WITH THE SERVICE AND DATE FOR HEARING REQUIREMENTS OF THIS ARTICLE ARE DEEMED CONTROVERTED BY THE CLAIMANT. THE PETITIONER HAS THE DUTY OF PRODUCING EVIDENCE ON THOSE MATTERS." (IBID.) PETITIONER FAILED TO PUT FORTH EVIDENCE ON COMPLIANCE WITH CC 8484 (E), (G), (H). ADDITIONALLY, THE COURT ON ITS OWN MOTION PULLED THE PETITION IN THIS CASE, AND NOTICED THAT IT WAS NOT VERIFIED AND DID NOT HAVE THE REQUISITE DECLARATION TO SATISFY CCP 8488. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC3.1312(B). JUDGE CHARLES F. HAINES, CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED (D501)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Hearing On Verified Petition To Release Property From Mechanics Lien
Off Calendar Apr-05-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER REALSMART FUND 23 L.P.'s Motion And Hearing On Verified Petition To Release Property From Mechanics Lien:

DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. According to Civil Code 8488 (a), "[a]t the hearing both (1) the petition and (2) the issue of compliance with the service and date for hearing requirements of this article are deemed controverted by the claimant. The petitioner has the duty of producing evidence on those matters." (Ibid.) Petitioner failed to put forth evidence on compliance with CC 8484 (e), (g), (h).

Additionally, the Court on its own motion pulled the petition in this case, and noticed that it was not verified and did not have the requisite declaration to satisfy CCP 8488.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312(b). Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported (D501)
